title: ToolTreaux 6pc 10k 14k 18k 22k Complete Gold Testing Kit with Testing Stone
short_description: Features: COMPLETE GOLD TESTING KIT: Easily test the karat content of gold with ToolTreaux’s Complete Gold Testing Kit! The kit includes four, 0.5oz shatterproof plastic squeeze bottles, a neutralizing solution and one gold testing stone; the testing solutions are potent, effective and will see you through hundreds of tests.
narrative: Easily test the karat content of gold with ToolTreaux’s Complete Gold Testing Kit! The kit includes four, 0.5 ounce (oz) bottles with 10k, 14k, 18k and 22k solutions, a neutralizing solution and one gold testing stone. The testing solutions are potent, effective and will see you through hundreds of tests! A must-have tool for gold panning, jewelry appraisal or other professions that work with gold and precious metals. And, housed in small, sturdy, shatterproof plastic squeeze bottles, the gold testing solution bottles are comfortable to maneuver, while also easily maintaining control over the amount of solution escaping the bottle. GOLD TESTING KIT METHOD: This gold testing method is best used on gold that is yet to be smelted, due to the harsh nature of the solution, that could potentially damage an already finished item; if testing fine jewelry or other finished gold items, be sure to choose an inconspicuous spot so as not to compromise the finished piece HOW THE GOLD TESTING KIT WORKS: To test gold karat content and purity, scratch the item onto the test stone leaving a visible deposit, then place a small drop of the solution over top of deposit; if the gold is the same karat or higher the solution will not affect the deposit; if the deposit is of a lower karat, the deposit will dissolve and eventually disappear; ensure gold testing stone has been thoroughly washed before completing any testing. PLEASE NOTE: Exercise the utmost caution when opening and using this product and method of testing! Proper protective eye wear and gloves are highly recommended, as the solution can burn unprotected skin. Read the label on the bottle and follow the included operational instructions. Keep out of Reach from Children.

narrative: Safely test the karat content of gold with ToolTreaux’s 22k Gold Testing Safety Kit! The kit includes x1 0.5oz shatterproof plastic squeeze bottle, x1 pair of safety glasses, x2 plastic pipettes, x2 glass vials and x1 testing stone; the 22k gold testing solution will see you through hundreds of tests! A must-have tool for gold panning, coin, antiques and jewelry appraisal, or other professions that work with gold and precious metals. 22k GOLD TESTING KIT METHOD: This gold testing method is ideally used on gold that is yet to be smelted, due to the harsh nature of the solution that could potentially damage an already finished item; if testing fine jewelry or other finished gold items, be sure to choose an inconspicuous spot so as not to compromise the finish of the item HOW THE GOLD TESTING KIT WORKS: To test gold karat content, scratch the item onto the test stone leaving a visible deposit, then place a small drop of the solution over top of deposit; if the gold is the same karat or higher the solution will not affect the deposit; if the deposit is of a lower karat, the deposit will dissolve and eventually disappear; ensure gold testing stone has been thoroughly washed before completing any testing SAFETY NOTE: Testing Solutions can be harmful to the skin. Please exercise the utmost caution when opening and using this product and method of testing! Proper protective eye wear and gloves are highly recommended, as the solution can burn unprotected skin. Read the label on the bottle and follow the included operational instructions.
